reviews.review_description: ￼ I am being forced to write this game five stars, but nothing happens although I follow the instructions on what it says, and I clicked the continue button. Nothing also happens and whenever I try to do anything I can’t because I can’t access the real game. I’m just stuck in a stone box that has part of stump inside of it so whatever I do, I cannot figure out how to play this game. ￼
When i join I'm stuck in a box and cant get out fix your game and child#### really? 1 star man 1star
